2604.16272.title: VEFX-Bench: A Holistic Benchmark for Generic Video Editing and Visual Effects
2604.16272.paper_summary: As AI-assisted video creation becomes increasingly practical, instruction-guided video editing has become essential for refining generated or captured footage to meet professional requirements. Yet the field still lacks both a large-scale human-annotated dataset with complete editing examples and a standardized evaluator for comparing editing systems. Existing resources are limited by small scale, missing edited outputs, or the absence of human quality labels, while current evaluation often relies on expensive manual inspection or generic vision-language model judges that are not specialized for editing quality. We introduce VEFX-Dataset, a human-annotated dataset containing 5,049 video editing examples across 9 major editing categories and 32 subcategories, each labeled along three decoupled dimensions: Instruction Following, Rendering Quality, and Edit Exclusivity. Building on VEFX-Dataset, we propose VEFX-Reward, a reward model designed specifically for video editing quality assessment. VEFX-Reward jointly processes the source video, the editing instruction, and the edited video, and predicts per-dimension quality scores via ordinal regression. We further release VEFX-Bench, a benchmark of 300 curated video-prompt pairs for standardized comparison of editing systems. Experiments show that VEFX-Reward aligns more strongly with human judgments than generic VLM judges and prior reward models on both standard IQA/VQA metrics and group-wise preference evaluation. Using VEFX-Reward as an evaluator, we benchmark representative commercial and open-source video editing systems, revealing a persistent gap between visual plausibility, instruction following, and edit locality in current models.
2604.16272.paper_summary_zh: 隨著AI輔助視頻創作變得越來越實用，指導性視頻編輯已成為精煉生成或捕獲的影像以滿足專業要求的必要條件。然而，該領域仍然缺乏一個大規模的人類標註數據集，該數據集包含完整的編輯示例，以及一個標準化的評估器來比較編輯系統。現有資源受到小規模、缺少編輯輸出或缺乏人類質量標籤的限制，而當前的評估通常依賴於昂貴的手動檢查或不專門針對編輯質量的通用視覺-語言模型評審。我們介紹VEFX-Dataset，一個人類標註的數據集，包含9個主要編輯類別和32個子類別中的5,049個視頻編輯示例，每個示例沿著三個解耦維度標註：指令遵循、渲染質量和編輯排他性。在VEFX-Dataset的基礎上，我們提出VEFX-Reward，一個專門為視頻編輯質量評估設計的獎勵模型。VEFX-Reward共同處理源視頻、編輯指令和編輯後視頻，並通過序數回歸預測每個維度的質量分數。我們進一步發布VEFX-Bench，一個包含300對策劃視頻-提示的基準，用於標準化比較編輯系統。實驗顯示，VEFX-Reward在標準IQA/VQA指標和群體偏好評估中，與人類判斷的對齊程度比通用VLM評審和先前的獎勵模型更強。使用VEFX-Reward作為評估器，我們對代表性的商業和開源視頻編輯系統進行基準測試，揭示了當前模型在視覺合理性、指令遵循和編輯局部性之間的持續差距。
2604.16272.author: Xiangbo Gao et.al.
2604.16272.authors: Xiangbo Gao, Sicong Jiang, Bangya Liu, Xinghao Chen, Minglai Yang, Siyuan Yang, Mingyang Wu, Jiongze Yu, Qi Zheng, Haozhi Wang, Jiayi Zhang, Jared Yang, Jie Yang, Zihan Wang, Qing Yin, Zhengzhong Tu
